text.description:
Aggregated text the model produced this turn â€” narration the
model emitted alongside (or instead of) tool calls.

tool_calls.description: Tool calls that mapped cleanly to an IPC dispatch triple.

unmapped_tool_calls.description: Tool calls the mapper rejected. Empty in the happy path.

usage.description:
C27 (#380) â€” provider-reported token usage for this single
round. `None` for providers that don't report it. The caller
(`nexus-agent`'s round loop) accumulates this across rounds to
enforce a session token ceiling.

AiProposedToolCall.description:
One element of [`AiProposeReply::tool_calls`] â€” a model
tool-use block whose name was successfully resolved to an IPC
dispatch triple via `crate::tools::dispatch_target`.

args.description:
Args ready to hand to `ipc_call`. May differ from the model's
raw input when the tool requires reshape (e.g. `write_file`'s
`content` â†’ `bytes`).

command_id.description: Command id within the target plugin.

name.description: Tool name as advertised in the registry.

AiUnmappedToolCall.description:
One element of [`AiProposeReply::unmapped_tool_calls`] â€” a tool
call the model issued under a name `dispatch_target` didn't
recognise. Surfaced to callers for diagnostics rather than
silently dropped.

error.description: Why mapping failed (unknown tool, malformed mcp name, etc.).

TokenUsage.description:
C27 (#380) â€” provider-reported token usage, accumulated across the
calls made through one provider instance. Providers are built
per-request by `build_ai_provider`, so an instance's tally spans
exactly one logical operation â€” including every round of a
multi-turn tool loop.

input_tokens.description:
Tokens the provider billed for the request side (prompt /
input, provider-reported â€” not estimated).

output_tokens.description: Tokens the provider billed for the response side.
